_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: NRG-1β effects on MPNST cell invasion were erbB-dependent, as PD168393 inhibited NRG-1β stimulated invasion of ST88-14 (Fig. 10 C; black bars) and A202 (Fig. 10 D; black bars) cells
details: Inhibited NRG-1β stimulated invasion of ST88-14 and A202 cells in a concentration-dependent manner
